segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question, Why doesn't Aunt Jennifer tell anyone how old she is?

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题：为什么詹妮弗姑妈从不告诉别人她的年龄？

segments.text: My Aunt Jennifer is an actress.

translations.zh-Hans: 我的姑妈詹妮弗是一名演员。

segments.text: She must be at least 35 years old.
In spite of this, she often appears on the stage as a young girl.

translations.zh-Hans: 尽管如此，她却常在舞台上扮演年轻姑娘。

segments.text: Jennifer will have to take part in a new play soon.

translations.zh-Hans: 詹妮弗很快又要参加一出新剧的演出。

segments.text: This time, she will be a girl of 17.

translations.zh-Hans: 这一次，她将扮演一个17岁的少女。

segments.text: In the play, she must appear in a bright red dress and long black stockings.

translations.zh-Hans: 剧中她必须穿一条鲜红色连衣裙和黑色长筒袜。

segments.text: Last year, in another play, she had to wear short socks and a bright orange colored dress.

translations.zh-Hans: 去年，在另一出戏里，她得穿短袜和一条鲜橙色的连衣裙。

segments.text: If anyone ever asks her how old she is, she always answers, Darling, it must be terrible to be grown up.

translations.zh-Hans: 要是有人问她多大年纪，她总是回答：“亲爱的，长大成人一定很可怕吧！”
